body:
For a typical residential garage door, a professional can usually replace the spring in **30 minutes to 2 hours** , with **about 1 hour being common** for a straightforward job. [Cost to Replace a Garage Door Spring (2026) | ConsumerAffairs®](https://www.consumeraffairs.com/homeowners/cost-to-replace-a-garage-door-spring.html?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[How Long Does It Typically Take to Replace Two Garage Springs? | ProMatcher](https://garage-doors.promatcher.com/answers/how-long-does-it-typically-take-to-replace-two-garage-springs-148?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

The exact time depends on several factors:

  * **Single torsion spring:** often 30–60 minutes. [How Long Does Garage Door Spring Repair Take? (Cost + Time)](https://fixurge.com/blog/how-long-does-garage-door-spring-repair-take/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * **Two torsion springs:** typically 45–90 minutes. [How Long Does Garage Door Spring Repair Take? (Cost + Time)](https://fixurge.com/blog/how-long-does-garage-door-spring-repair-take/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Fast Garage Door Broken Spring Repair San Francisco | Alfonso](https://alfonsogaragedoor.com/garage-door-broken-spring/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * **Extension spring systems:** around 1–2 hours. [How Long Does Garage Door Spring Repair Take? (Cost + Time)](https://fixurge.com/blog/how-long-does-garage-door-spring-repair-take/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[How Long Does Garage Door Spring Replacement Really Take?](https://ggdoor.com/how-long-does-it-take-to-fix-a-garage-door/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * If cables, bearings, rollers, or other hardware also need repair, the visit can extend to **2–3 hours or more**. [Garage Door Spring Repair: A Complete Guide to Signs, Costs, and Safety | OGD®](https://ogd.com/garage-door-spring-repair-guide/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[How Long Does Garage Door Spring Repair Take? (Cost + Time)](https://fixurge.com/blog/how-long-does-garage-door-spring-repair-take/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

Many companies complete the replacement, rebalance the door, lubricate components, and test the opener during the same service call. [Garage Door Spring Repair: A Complete Guide to Signs, Costs, and Safety | OGD®](https://ogd.com/garage-door-spring-repair-guide/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[How Long Does Garage Door Spring Repair Take? (Cost + Time)](https://fixurge.com/blog/how-long-does-garage-door-spring-repair-take/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

One important note: garage door springs are under very high tension, so spring replacement is generally considered a job for a trained technician rather than a DIY repair. [Cost to Replace a Garage Door Spring (2026) | ConsumerAffairs®](https://www.consumeraffairs.com/homeowners/cost-to-replace-a-garage-door-spring.html?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Frequently Asked Questions | FAQ — O'Brien Garage Doors](https://www.obriendoor.com/faq?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you're asking because your spring just broke, I can also tell you what symptoms indicate it's safe to use the door temporarily (or not) and what a typical replacement costs in your area.
